violations.description: Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Condensation in the walk in cooler drains into a bucket.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles missing exposing the attic.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Condensation from unit in the walk in cooler drains into a bucket.
